scripts.dev: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm assets:studio && corepack pnpm --filter @novel-game-maker/studio dev
scripts.dev:player: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm assets:player && corepack pnpm --filter @novel-game-maker/player dev
scripts.dev:player:fog: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm assets:player -- fog-name-village && corepack pnpm --filter @novel-game-maker/player dev
scripts.dev:api: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm --filter @novel-game-maker/api dev
scripts.dev:worker: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm --filter @novel-game-maker/api dev:worker
scripts.worker:api: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm --filter @novel-game-maker/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @novel-game-maker/api worker
scripts.db:migrate: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm --filter @novel-game-maker/api migrate
scripts.db:migrate:dist: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm --filter @novel-game-maker/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @novel-game-maker/api migrate:dist
scripts.test: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm -r --if-present test
scripts.build: corepack pnpm assets:studio && corepack pnpm assets:player && corepack pnpm -r --if-present build
scripts.export:fog: corepack pnpm build:packages && corepack pnpm export:sample -- fog-name-village
scripts.verify:mvp: corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm export:sample && corepack pnpm image2:manifest && corepack pnpm audit:mvp
scripts.verify:production: corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm audit:production
scripts.verify:windows: corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm export:fog
